untranslatable_reason: The '13 New Price Lines' pattern requires candlestick shape analysis and pattern recognition (detecting 13 similar shapes, horizontal consolidation periods, and opening gap confirmation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and bar properties). The pattern detection requires visual/structural analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal contains context-dependent direction (reversal pattern with different success rates for bull/bear markets). Reversal rates provided (77% closing price confirmation in bull, 56% in bear; 73% candle color in bull, 57% in bear; 72% opening gap in bull, 36% in bear) cannot be operationalized without pattern recognition capability. Used SMA crossover as placeholder reversal logic. Pattern components like '13 new price lines with similar shapes', 'opening gap confirmation', and 'candle color confirmation' require candlestick pattern detection unavailable in allowed indicators.
